name: Watos Corea Co., Ltd.
summary: Watos Corea Co., Ltd. produces and sells bathroom materials in South Korea. The company offers toilet fittings, feces fittings, basin fittings, urinal fittings, and S-traps for service sink, as well as bath drainage products, floor drainage products, toilet elbows, bubble drainage products, penetrating sleeves, pipe fasteners, basin waterproof sockets, and waterproof sleeves for bubble layer drain piping. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Jangseong, South Korea.
